steps.prompt: Press + on the {fruit_a_p} a few times to make it bigger than the {fruit_b_p}!
steps.feedback: The {fruit_a_p} group is growing — it's bigger! See the label? Now add some {fruit_b_p} too!
The {fruit_b_p} is growing! Can you make them the same — equal groups? Use + and − to match them!
Equal! Same number in each group — neither bigger nor smaller. bigger, smaller, same — you can see all three!
